response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle create_order command: validate user and items, calculate total, deduct stock, create order",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains user_id and items list", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with success, message, and data", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["user existence check", "stock check", "total calculation", "stock deduction", "order creation"], "out_of_scope": ["payment", "shipping", "order cancellation"]},
      "behavior": "Validates user exists (users.exists). For each item, checks product exists and stock >= requested, calculates total price. Deducts stock (products.update). Creates order (orders.create). Returns success with order_id and total_price or error message.",
      "signature": "def CreateOrderHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "users", "op": "read", "description": "Check user existence"},
        {"variable": "products", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read product info and update stock"},
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "write", "description": "Create new order"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["users.get", "users.exists", "products.get", "products.update", "orders.create"]
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle pay_order command: validate order, check balance, deduct balance, update order status",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains order_id", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with success, message, and data", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["order existence check", "status validation (pending)", "user balance check", "balance deduction", "order status update to paid"], "out_of_scope": ["stock management", "order creation"]},
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'pending' (orders.get). Gets user (users.get) and checks balance >= total_price. Deducts balance (users.update). Updates order status to 'paid' (orders.update). Returns success or error.",
      "signature": "def PayOrderHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "users", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read user balance and update"},
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read order and update status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.get", "orders.update", "orders.exists", "users.get", "users.update", "users.exists"]
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains order_id", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with success, message, and data", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["order existence check", "status validation (paid)", "order status update to shipped"], "out_of_scope": ["payment", "cancellation", "completion"]},
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'paid' (orders.get). Updates status to 'shipped' (orders.update). Returns success or error.",
      "signature": "def ShipOrderHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read order and update status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.get", "orders.update", "orders.exists"]
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains order_id", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with success, message, and data", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["order existence check", "status validation (shipped)", "order status update to completed"], "out_of_scope": ["payment", "cancellation", "shipping"]},
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'shipped' (orders.get). Updates status to 'completed' (orders.update). Returns success or error.",
      "signature": "def CompleteOrderHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read order and update status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.get", "orders.update", "orders.exists"]
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund balance if paid, update status",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains order_id", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with success, message, and data", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["order existence check", "status validation (pending or paid)", "stock restoration", "balance refund (if paid)", "order status update to cancelled"], "out_of_scope": ["order creation", "payment"]},
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and status is 'pending' or 'paid' (orders.get). If status was 'paid', refunds balance (users.update). For each item in order, restores stock (products.update). Updates order status to 'cancelled' (orders.update). Returns success or error.",
      "signature": "def CancelOrderHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "users", "op": "read_write", "description": "Refund balance if paid"},
        {"variable": "products", "op": "read_write", "description": "Restore stock for items"},
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read order and update status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.get", "orders.update", "orders.exists", "users.get", "users.update", "users.exists", "products.get", "products.update"]
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Optional user_id and/or status_filter", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with list of orders", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["fetching orders with filters"], "out_of_scope": ["modifying orders", "user or product details"]},
      "behavior": "Calls orders.list with optional user_id and status from order_data. Returns list in data field. Returns success always (or error if internal failure).",
      "signature": "def ListOrdersHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read", "description": "Read orders list"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.list"]
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with summary",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains user_id", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with list of orders and summary statistics", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["fetching user orders", "computing summary"], "out_of_scope": ["modifying orders", "user details"]},
      "behavior": "Calls orders.list with user_id from order_data. Then computes total_order_count and counts per status (pending, paid, shipped, completed, cancelled) from the returned list. Returns list and summary in data field.",
      "signature": "def GetUserOrdersHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read", "description": "Read orders list"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["orders.list"]
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProductsHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_products command: list products with optional low stock filter",
      "inputs": [{"name": "order_data", "type": "dict", "description": "Optional low_stock threshold", "source": "parent input"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result with list of products", "consumer": "parent caller"}],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["fetching products with optional low stock filter"], "out_of_scope": ["modifying products", "orders"]},
      "behavior": "Calls products.list with optional low_stock_threshold from order_data. Returns list in data field.",
      "signature": "def ListProductsHandler(order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "products", "op": "read", "description": "Read products list"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["products.list"]
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System is decomposed into eight command-specific handlers, each responsible for a single command (create, pay, ship, complete, cancel, list orders, get user orders, list products). This ensures clear separation of concerns: each handler validates its own preconditions, performs its own data operations, and returns a standardized result. The parent function (OrderManagementSystem) selects the appropriate handler based on the 'command' input and delegates the work. This decomposition avoids cross-calls between children and keeps each child focused on a specific business operation, matching the functional requirements FR-001 through FR-008."
}
